name: RPlog_Harsh_Realities
title: A Sleepless Night and an Unwanted Answer
summary: In the Academy Library, the haggard archaeologist Paul Nighman has buried himself in Mandalorian language drills for two sleepless days when his childhood mentor, the Mon Calamari Dr. Molari Canto, gently confronts him about using study to avoid his feelings. After a tense, guilt-laden exchange, Paul leaves to walk the shoreline and wrestle with his confusion over Shenner, a young woman who has confessed her love for him. Turning his researcher's mind on the problem, he admits he cares for her and is even attracted to her, but concludes she is too young and fragile and that he is the wrong man to return her affection. Unsatisfied by the correct answer, Paul resolves that he cannot end things from a distance and must return to face Shenner directly. The log is an introspective solo character piece centered entirely on Paul's reckoning with himself.
